reasoning: CVaR stop-loss triggered on GLD at -5.14% drawdown, exceeding the 5% threshold. Gold position sold immediately to prevent further losses. OR.PA at -4.46% remains within threshold, FEZ at -2.23% comfortable. Portfolio now 40% cash (€3649), providing strong defensive position.
discipline_note: Third stop-loss execution today (RMS.PA -6.30%, AIR.PA -6.44%, GLD -5.14%). While painful, adherence to systematic stop-loss rules prevents catastrophic drawdowns. The 5% threshold was set based on CVaR analysis and must be respected without exception.
session_summary: 2026-03-19 has seen significant volatility in European equities and gold. Stop-losses have crystallized losses but preserved capital for redeployment. Cash position now 40% of portfolio, ready for opportunistic entries when market stabilizes.
